title: CryptoNews Article
description: A cryptocurrency news article returned by the CryptoNews API.

news_url.description: URL of the original news article.

image_url.description: URL of the article's featured image.

title.description: Headline title of the news article.

text.description: Summary or excerpt text of the article.

date.description: Publication date and time of the article.

topics.description: List of topics associated with the article.

sentiment.description: AI-computed sentiment classification for the article.

type.description: Type of news content (Article, Video, etc.).

tickers.description: Cryptocurrency ticker symbols mentioned in the article.
